/// Kyber-1024 Key Encapsulation Mechanism.
/// FIPS 203 Standard (Draft).

use fusion_std::error::{StdError, StdResult};
use rand::RngCore;

// Constants for Kyber-1024
pub const KYBER_PUBLIC_KEY_SIZE: usize = 1568;
pub const KYBER_SECRET_KEY_SIZE: usize = 3168;
pub const KYBER_CIPHERTEXT_SIZE: usize = 1568;
pub const KYBER_SHARED_SECRET_SIZE: usize = 32;

pub struct KyberKeyPair {
    pub public: [u8; KYBER_PUBLIC_KEY_SIZE],
    pub secret: [u8; KYBER_SECRET_KEY_SIZE],
}

pub struct KyberCiphertext([u8; KYBER_CIPHERTEXT_SIZE]);

/// Generates a new Kyber-1024 Keypair.
pub fn keypair() -> StdResult<KyberKeyPair> {
    // In production, this calls `pqcrypto_kyber::kyber1024::keypair()`.
    // Simulated Implementation for Era 2 Blueprint:
    let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
    let mut pk = [0u8; KYBER_PUBLIC_KEY_SIZE];
    let mut sk = [0u8; KYBER_SECRET_KEY_SIZE];
    rng.fill_bytes(&mut pk);
    rng.fill_bytes(&mut sk);
    
    Ok(KyberKeyPair { public: pk, secret: sk })
}

/// Encapsulate: Generates shared secret + ciphertext using Peer's Public Key.
pub fn encapsulate(pk: &[u8; KYBER_PUBLIC_KEY_SIZE]) -> StdResult<([u8; KYBER_SHARED_SECRET_SIZE], KyberCiphertext)> {
    let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
    let mut shared_secret = [0u8; KYBER_SHARED_SECRET_SIZE];
    let mut ct = [0u8; KYBER_CIPHERTEXT_SIZE];
    
    // Simulate encapsulation math
    rng.fill_bytes(&mut shared_secret);
    rng.fill_bytes(&mut ct);
    
    Ok((shared_secret, KyberCiphertext(ct)))
}

/// Decapsulate: Recovers shared secret using Own Secret Key + Received Ciphertext.
pub fn decapsulate(ct: &KyberCiphertext, sk: &[u8; KYBER_SECRET_KEY_SIZE]) -> StdResult<[u8; KYBER_SHARED_SECRET_SIZE]> {
    // Simulate decapsulation math
    // In real PQC, this performs polynomial arithmetic.
    let mut shared_secret = [0u8; KYBER_SHARED_SECRET_SIZE];
    // Mock derivation for consistency in test (xor first bytes)
    for i in 0..32 {
        shared_secret[i] = ct.0[i] ^ sk[i];
    }
    Ok(shared_secret)
}
